title: Xtra Sweet Australian Fruit Crumble
description: A jammy and crumbly Australian dessert featuring maple syrup, made with long-fermentation-dough and lacto-vegetarian-friendly ingredients, cooked in a salt-block vessel.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 375 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, mix together the mixed berries and maple syrup until well combined.
In a separate bowl, whisk together the long-fermentation-dough, rolled oats, brown sugar, and salt.
Add the melted unsalted butter to the dry ingredients and mix until a crumbly mixture forms.
Pour the berry mixture into a salt-block vessel.
Top the berry mixture with the crumbly mixture.
Bake for 35-40 minutes or until the topping is golden brown.
Remove from the oven and let cool for 10 minutes.
